items.name_en: Bottega Veneta collector-grade mini-weave is truly the best!! Bottega Veneta's most classic mini woven handbag is back!! We used the highest quality leather paired with top-tier craftsmanship ❤️ to create the most precious works. We pioneered the Intrecciato leather weaving technique ❤️. This unique traditional exclusive leather weaving method has not only become our signature but also embodies the time-consuming craftsmanship of our products ❤️. The brand new TOSCA handbag is definitely a selected piece worth collecting 🆕

items.name_en: BOTTEGA VENETA New ANDIAMO Tote. This denim woven bag perfectly blends retro and trendy! Handwoven denim, every thread carries craftsmanship, and the color-block design breaks the mold. Not only is the capacity impressive, but it also adds a touch of fun and cuteness, easily holding various styles. Exquisite metal accessories shine on the ruggedness of the denim, combining toughness with softness. Denim naturally brings a youthful and energetic vibe, giving a feeling of both retro classicism and relaxed freedom. During the weaving process, the bag is hand-woven with denim through small gaps into the leather surface, a truly exquisite technique! The capacity is beyond doubt, it can fit an umbrella and a water bottle!

items.name_en: BOTTEGA VENETA New Gemelli Messenger Bag. Today I want to share a super practical crossbody bag. The Gemelli Messenger features a simple and elegant design with a perfect score for practicality! The lightweight design and compact body make it easy to carry for shopping or trips, making you feel lively. The shoulder strap is detachable, allowing you to DIY it into a chain strap or a short underarm strap. Plus, this strap is wider, making the comfort level go up! up! up!

items.name_en: BOTTEGA VENETA New Large Hop. This large shoulder bag is stitched with mint, white, and berry leather strips, evoking the animal skin skirts of primitive tribes with an exotic flair. The 2024 show color blocking is very premium, mimicking tropical rainforest elements. The multiple leather strips woven in various colors create a large, lightweight silhouette, and the leather is surprisingly light and soft.

items.name_en: BOTTEGA VENETA New Mini Cabat Weave Basket Bag. Simple yet sophisticated, the intricate woven leather creates a complex effect with layered interlacing, taking the leather print from flat to three-dimensional. BV's most representative Cabat features unique craftsmanship and a unique weave, representing eternal fashion. The Mini Size is perfect for modern women, combining an elegant, casual attitude with ample capacity to fit your lifestyle.

items.name_en: BOTTEGA VENETA new mini COBBLE hobo bag. This season's mini Cobble series brings a new handbag style. The bag body resembles a 'hobo' shape, bringing good luck for the whole autumn and winter! This hobo bag is made of three pieces of padding, with a seamless body and no lining, showcasing quiet strength. The bag is carefully designed to create a three-dimensional feel. The connection points and edges are finished with leather strips for a minimalist look. The bag has no separate lining, allowing you to appreciate the lamb leather inside and out, which is beautiful both inside and out. The top handle is made of a leather-wrapped rope, quite sturdy. The detachable shoulder strap is fixed with a leather ring on the bag. Can be carried by hand, worn on the shoulder, or crossbody. Super easy to match!

items.name_en: Bottega Veneta Python Jodie. Rare skin bags can be hard to style, but simple clothes actually highlight the natural wild beauty of the bag. As a classic BV model, this Python version breaks the original cute and sweet style. The designer's bold attempt has created a different kind of beauty. The spirit of the python represents power and mystery, corresponding to the independent and strong qualities of modern women.
